FlagsBanner Magnets 4 Pack HomeCustom FlagsTear Drop Flags Tear Drop Flags - Order Custom TearDrop Flags Online! Custom Printed Indoor and Outdoor Banner Flags Looking for a unique and modern way to showcase your promotions or branding? Teardrop flags are the perfect solution, offering sleek designs that stand out in both indoor and outdoor settings. Designed with durability and style, these teardrop banners provide vibrant prints, aerodynamic shapes, and unmatched visual impact. Start creating your custom teardrop signs today! Please note the actual finished flag size is smaller. The sizes listed include the printed flag and the base. Click on a teardrop flag size below for pricing and to get started on your order: 11.5 Foot Tear Drop Flag View Product 15 Foot Tear Drop Flag View Product 6 Foot Tear Drop Flag View Product 8 Foot Tear Drop Flag View Product Teardrop Flags: Elevate Your Brand with Customized Solutions Teardrop flags are one of the most distinctive options for advertising, blending practicality with elegance. Whether for grand openings, trade shows, or outdoor promotions, these flags allow businesses to capture attention effectively. More About Teardrop Flags Return to Top Teardrop flags work great for grand opening, sales, open houses, or just letting people know that you are open! These flags can be used indoors or outdoors to present messages and corporate identities. Customize your teardrop flag with any size, design, and base option you want, using our online design tool or uploading your own artwork. Order your teardrop flag today from Banners.com and get fast delivery and excellent service. Download Teardrop Flag Templates to Create Your Design If you would like to design your own custom teardrop flags, you can download the templates below and then upload your files. We will check the artwork and send you a proof to verify that everything looks ok before we send your flag into production. Or, choose from hundreds of templates to customize in our custom flag maker. Teardrop Flags Templates Flag Size Single Sided Template Double Sided Template 6 Foot Flags 20.75"W x 52.25"H Template 20.75"W x 52.25"H Template 8 Foot Flags 29.5"W x 66.3"H Template 29.5"W x 66.3"H Template 11 Foot Flags 38.5"W x 106.2"H Template 38.5"W x 106.2"H Template 15 Foot Flags 47"W x 156.1"H Template 47"W x 156.1"H Template All teardrop flags are printed using a direct dye sublimation printing process. This means that the ink goes through the fabric rather than sit on top of it. This creates an eye-popping display. The flag poles are constructed of a strong but flexible Carbon Composite material that is superior to other poles that have an aluminum base. Our pole hardware is now covered by a lifetime warranty! Why Choose Teardrop Flags? Teardrop flags offer several benefits that make them ideal for dynamic promotional needs: Eye-Catching Design: The aerodynamic teardrop shape ensures visibility even in windy conditions. Quality Fabric: Made from durable polyester and printed with direct dye sublimation for sharp, vibrant designs. Versatility: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, perfect for storefronts, events, and signage needs. Customization Options: Available in various sizes (6ft, 8ft, 11.5ft, and 15ft) with options for single-reverse or double-sided prints. What Makes Our Teardrop Flags Stand Out? What sets our custom teardrop flags apart from competitors? Durability: Constructed with high-tensile elastic polyester binding and reinforced pole pockets for long-lasting performance. Premium Pole Hardware: Strong, flexible pole structures made of carbon composite material, covered by a lifetime warranty. Bright, Vibrant Prints: Direct dye sublimation creates high-quality, vivid designs that stand out. Options for Every Space: Choose from spike bases for outdoors or heavy-duty cross bases for indoor/outdoor versatility. Weather-Resistant: Aerodynamic construction keeps flags stable even during wind, rain, or snow. Lightweight & Portable: Easy to assemble and transport for events or temporary displays. Efficient Ordering Process: Design your flag online with user-friendly tools or upload your own artwork. Design & Order Your Teardrop Flags Today! Ready to make a lasting impression with premium teardrop banners? Choose from quality templates or upload your own design to get started. Click below to explore our size offerings: 6-Foot Tear Drop Flag 8-Foot Tear Drop Flag 11.5-Foot Tear Drop Flag 15-Foot Tear Drop Flag Not sure where to start? Download one of our free design templates or let us help with your flag customization process. For bold, effective signage solutions, trust Banners.com’s teardrop signs to enhance your brand visibility. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top What are teardrop flags (teardrop banners)? Teardrop flags are aerodynamic, teardrop-shaped banner flags designed for high-visibility promotions indoors or outdoors. What are teardrop flags used for? They’re commonly used for grand openings, sales, open houses, trade shows, and storefront promotions. What sizes do teardrop flags come in, and what are the printed dimensions? Options include 6 ft (20.75" W × 52.25" H), 8 ft (29.5" W × 66.3" H), 11.5 ft (38.5" W × 106.2" H), and 15 ft (47" W × 156.1" H). Do the listed sizes include the base? Yes—the listed display sizes include the printed flag plus the base, so the finished flag portion is smaller than the overall display size. Are teardrop flags single-sided or double-sided? Choose single-sided (single-reverse) or double-sided printing using
